title: CV2 LED / SW Board
description:
CV2 LED / SW Board

LED / SW Board

To replace the LED/SW board, follow the steps below.

(1) Remove the top cover. (Refer to Internal Structure of CV2)

(2) Remove four screws fixing the internal brackets.

(3) Remove four screws fixing the front cover. (2 screws on the top face, 2 screws on the bottom face.)

(4) Remove the fitting screws on the both ends of following connectors using a nut driver.

VGA / DVI-D / CON1 / CON2

(5) Remove the front cover.

(6) Remove the cables connected to the LED/SW board.

(7) Remove two screws fixing the LED/SW board and remove the board.

(8) Set the new LED/SW board and fix it in the reverse order to removal.
